idle.title: my anesthesia
idle.text: Want to chat in private messages and get unique content for only $10 a month?
idle.sub: *35% on payment for 12 months. By clicking below, you confirm that you are 18 years of age or older.

privacy.s1P1: This Personal Data Processing Policy has been developed in accordance with the Federal Law of the Russian Federation No. 152-FZ "On Personal Data".
privacy.s1P2: Personal data operator: Anastasia V. Z., an individual operating in the territory of the Russian Federation.
privacy.s1P3: This Policy defines the procedure for processing and protecting personal data of users of the site my.anesthesia.com.
privacy.s1P4: Use of the Site constitutes the User's agreement with the terms of this Policy.
privacy.s2P1: The Operator may process the following personal data of the User:
privacy.s2Li3: other information voluntarily provided in the contact form;
privacy.s2Li6: technical information about browser, device and visit time.
privacy.s2P2: The Site does not collect special categories of personal data (health, political views, religious beliefs, intimate life, etc.).
privacy.s3Li2: ensuring the operation of the Site;
privacy.s3Li3: analysing traffic and improving the quality of the Site;
privacy.s3P2: The Operator does not carry out automated decision-making that has legal consequences for the User.
privacy.s4P1: Personal data is processed on the basis of:
privacy.s4Li2: the User's consent to the processing of personal data, expressed by filling in the contact form and submitting data.
privacy.s5P1: Personal data is processed with or without the use of automation.
privacy.s5P2: Personal data is stored on servers located in the Russian Federation (Beget hosting provider).
privacy.s5P3: The Operator takes necessary organisational and technical measures to protect personal data from unauthorised access, alteration, disclosure or destruction.
privacy.s5P4: Personal data is stored no longer than required to achieve the processing purposes.
privacy.s6P1: The Operator does not transfer personal data to third parties, except as provided by the legislation of the Russian Federation.
privacy.s6P2: The Site may contain links to third-party resources (including Boosty and other platforms). When visiting such resources, personal data is processed in accordance with the relevant service's policy. The Operator is not responsible for the actions of third parties.
privacy.s7P1: The User has the right to:
privacy.s7Li1: obtain information about their personal data;
privacy.s7Li2: request clarification, blocking or deletion of personal data;
privacy.s7Li3: withdraw consent to the processing of personal data.
privacy.s7P2: To exercise their rights, the User may send a request to the email:
privacy.s8P1: The Operator may make changes to this Policy. The current version is published on the Site.

terms.s1P1: This User Agreement (hereinafter — the Agreement) governs the use of the site my.anesthesia.com (hereinafter — the Site).
terms.s1P2: The owner of the Site is Anastasia V. Z., an individual operating in the territory of the Russian Federation (hereinafter — the Administration).
terms.s1P3: By using the Site, the User confirms their acceptance of the terms of this Agreement.
terms.s1P4: If the User disagrees with the terms of the Agreement, they must cease using the Site.
terms.s2P1: The Site is intended for persons aged 18 and over.
terms.s2P2: By using the Site, the User confirms that they are at least 18 years of age.
terms.s2P3: The Administration is not responsible for the use of the Site by persons who have not reached the specified age.
terms.s3P1: The Site is an informational blog.
terms.s3P2: All materials posted on the Site reflect the personal opinion of the author and are subjective.
terms.s3P3: Information is published for informational purposes only and does not constitute professional advice.
terms.s3P4: The Site does not provide medical, legal, financial or other services.
terms.s3P5: Use of information posted on the Site is at the User's own risk.
terms.s4P1: All materials posted on the Site (including texts, images, graphics, design elements, site structure and other materials) are subject to copyright and are protected by the legislation of the Russian Federation.
terms.s4P2: Copying, distribution, publication, modification or other use of the Site materials without prior written permission of the Administration is prohibited, except as expressly provided by the legislation of the Russian Federation.
terms.s4P3: Quoting materials is permitted provided that an active link to the Site is indicated.
terms.s5P1: The Administration is not responsible for:
terms.s5Li1: any losses or consequences arising from the use of information from the Site;
terms.s5Li5: the content of third-party resources to which links are placed.
terms.s5P2: The Site may contain links to external platforms (including Boosty and other services). The Administration does not control such platforms and is not responsible for their content, services or data processing practices.
terms.s6P1: The User may send a message via the contact form on the Site.
terms.s6P2: By submitting a message, the User confirms the accuracy of the data provided and agrees to the Personal Data Processing Policy posted on the Site.
terms.s7Li1: using the Site for unlawful purposes;
terms.s7Li2: attempting unauthorised access to the Site;
terms.s7Li3: disrupting the operation of the Site;
terms.s7Li5: using the Site materials in violation of the legislation of the Russian Federation.
terms.s8P1: The Administration may amend this Agreement without prior notice to Users.
terms.s8P2: The current version of the Agreement is posted on the Site.
terms.s9P1: Information posted on the Site does not constitute a public offer under Article 437 of the Civil Code of the Russian Federation.
terms.s9P2: Posting materials on the Site is not intended to conclude contracts and does not create obligations for the Administration.
terms.s10P1: The legislation of the Russian Federation applies to the relations between the User and the Administration.
terms.s10P2: Any disputes shall be resolved in accordance with the applicable legislation of the Russian Federation.
